docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Lab#1 Getting started with Springboot – Helloworld Example
docs.text:
1. Create a new project from Spring.io. Add the dependencies shown. Java 17 is required for Springboot 3.

  1. Generate and Import the Maven Project into your IDE.

  2. Now Add a Restcontroller class to your project as shown below.

  1. Test the application.
